Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-23-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MARINA OLSHANSKY'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint is taken off-calendar per the stipulation of parties. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-02-2015 Continued To Feb-23-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MARINA OLSHANSKY'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint is continued to February 23, 2015 to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than February 2, 2015 at 4:00 p.m. or the motion will be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)
